    C

    Cabin - Class in Model.Ship.Components
    Represents a Cabin component on the spaceship.
    Cabin(JsonObject) - Constructor for class Model.Ship.Components.Cabin
    Constructor to initialize a Cabin from a JSON object.
    Cabin(Card, ConnectorType, ConnectorType, ConnectorType, ConnectorType, Crewmates) - Constructor for class Model.Ship.Components.Cabin
    Standard constructor for Cabin with explicit parameters, with no match with image path.

    Constructor for Cabin with image path.

    CanInsertAliens - Class in Controller.RealTimeBuilding
    Helper class that tracks which types of aliens a player can still insert.
    CanInsertAliens(boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.CanInsertAliens
    Constructor that initializes insertion possibilities.
    canInsertPurple - Variable in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.CanInsertAliens
    Indicates if the player can still insert a purple alien
    canInstertBrown - Variable in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.CanInsertAliens
    Indicates if the player can still insert a brown alien

    Cannon – single or double, fires in specific directions based on orientation.

    Command for choosing a planet to land on during planet encounters.

    Clears test cards so normal loading is restored.

    CombatZone - Class in Model.Board.AdventureCards
    Represents the combat zone in the game, which consists of multiple lines of combat criteria and penalties.
    CombatZone(int, CardLevel, List<CombatZoneLine>) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.CombatZone
     
    CombatZone(JsonObject) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.CombatZone
    Constructs a CombatZone from a JSON representation.
    CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState
     
    CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int, double) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState
     
    CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState
     
    CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int, double) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState
     
    CombatZone1CannonShotsState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE
    Represents the state in which a player may throw cannon shots during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1CannonShotsState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1CannonShotsState
     
    CombatZone1CheckShipState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE
    Represents the state in which a player checks their ship's integrity after a cannon shot during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1CheckShipState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1CheckShipState
     
    CombatZone1CrewRemovalState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE
    Represents the state in which a player may remove crew members from their ship during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1CrewRemovalState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1CrewRemovalState
     
    CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE
    Represents the state in which a player declares engine power during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState
     
    CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState(Context, double) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState
     
    CombatZone1ManageShotState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE
    Represents the state in which a player manages a cannon shot during the combat zone.
    CombatZone1ManageShotState(Context, int) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1ManageShotState
     
    CombatZone1PowerDeclarationState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE
    Represents the state in which a player declares their firepower during the combat zone.
    CombatZone1PowerDeclarationState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1PowerDeclarationState
     
    CombatZone1PowerDeclarationState(Context, double) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1PowerDeclarationState
     
    CombatZone2_E_BatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone.
    CombatZone2_E_BatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.CombatZone2_E_BatteryRemovalState

    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone2_P_BatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.CombatZone2_P_BatteryRemovalState

    CombatZone2CannonShotsState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO
    Represents the state in which a player may throw the dice to determine where the shot is aimed.

    CombatZone2CheckShipState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO
    Represents the state in which a player checks their ship's integrity after a cannon shot during the combat zone.

    connect(String, Integer) - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Connects to the server with the specified hostname and port.

    Attempts to connect to the server using the specified hostname and port.
    connect(Network) - Method in class Controller.Server.Server
     
    ConnectAction - Class in View.Client.Actions
    Represents an action to connect to a server with a specified hostname(IP address) and port.

    ConnectedState - Class in View.Client.States
    Represents a state in which the client is connected to the network.

    Constructs a ConnectedState with the specified network.
    ConnectingState - Class in View.Client.States
    Represents the state of the client when it is attempting to connect to a server.
    ConnectingState(boolean) - Constructor for class View.Client.States.ConnectingState
    Constructs a ConnectingState with the specified connection type.
    ConnectionHandler - Interface in Networking
    Represents a handler for managing the completion of connections.

    console - Variable in class View.TUI
    The console used for input and output operations.
    context - Variable in class Controller.State
    Context for the state, used for contextual actions inside a card resolution
    Context - Class in Controller
    The Context class represents the current state of the game, including players, resources, and actions.
    Context(Controller) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context with the given controller, unique for each card.
    Context(Controller, AbandonedShip) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the AbandonedShip card.
    Context(Controller, AbandonedStation) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the AbandonedStation card.
    Context(Controller, CombatZone) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the CombatZone card.
    Context(Controller, MeteorSwarm) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the MeteorSwarm card.
    Context(Controller, OpenSpace) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the OpenSpace card.
    Context(Controller, Pirates) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the Pirates card.
    Context(Controller, Planets) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the Planets card.
    Context(Controller, Slavers) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the Slavers card.
    Context(Controller, Smugglers) - Constructor for class Controller.Context
    Constructs a Context for the Smugglers card.
